name: Stage - Late Y3 Power Player (Full Farm)
description: Represents a power player's entire farm: 4 big sheds plus cellar and barn preserves. 380 machines demanding 7900 EU/t. Uses 5 Radioisotope + 15 Combustion generators (8100 EU/t total). Single Energized Iridium Cable is massively undersized — expect severe throughput limiting, demonstrating why multiple networks are required.
